name: G-9 sync with operator registries: /standards-remove archives the matching folder file to <ns>/_archived/ per §17 G-9
command: mkdir -p tree/google .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'source:\n  id: legacy\n' > tree/google/legacy.yaml && touch .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id legacy --tree "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s tree/google/_archived/legacy.yaml ] && [ ! -f tree/google/legacy.yaml ] && echo archived 1>&2
